programs.title: Bamay
programs.sub_title: North Stradbroke Island, Quandamooka Country Part 1
programs.desc: Slow TV is back on NITV with more beautiful Bamay. Bamay III celebrates great Australian islands and saltwater country. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of country.

programs.desc: Slow TV is back on NITV with more beautiful Bamay. Bamay III celebrates great Australian islands and saltwater country. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of country.

programs.title: Toi Time
programs.desc: Tama sells kai at the market, Buzz shows Tama how to make burgers and Aunty Anika explains good manners at the dinner table.

programs.title: Waabiny Time
programs.desc: Maara, hands and djena, feet are very useful to us and together with the other parts of our body help us every day. Maara baam, hands clap and djena kakarook, feet dance. It's too deadly koolangka.

programs.title: Birds Eye View
programs.desc: Big Jim's mirror has gone missing! As much as he hates admitting it, he's missing his sassy cellmate. A bird hunt ensues, with Tui as a self-appointed Sherlock Holmes.

programs.title: Aussie Bush Tales
programs.desc: A mosquito annoys Moort all night. In the morning, he has itchy spots and is in a cranky mood.
